content: Phase 0.1: Archive existing FARM template to /app/legacy/
Phase 0.4: Bootstrap Next.js + TS + Tailwind + shadcn/ui in /app
Phase 0.5: Install all deps (Supabase SSR, Zod, Resend, react-hook-form, lucide, etc)
Phase 0.6: Configure supervisor (Next.js on 3000, proxy on 8001 for /api/*)
Phase 0.7: Apply schema.sql v3 to Supabase (46 tables, RLS, indexes)
Phase 0.8: Create Supabase Storage buckets (documents, dsc-files, engagement-letters)
Phase 0.9: Build lib/ scaffolding (supabase clients, auth, crypto, email, repositories pattern)
Phase 0.10: Apply design system tokens (Inter, zinc+teal-600, layout shells)
Phase 0.11: Auth flow (login, role-based redirect, middleware)
Phase 0.12: Seed reversible demo data (1 admin, 1 client, 1 team, sample services)
Phase 0.13: Day-3 RLS test script (7 tests from DPDP doc)
Phase 0.14: Verify Phase 0 end-to-end & update plan.md
